# All Video Downloader

> Download original-quality video or extract audio from any public URL. Convert between MP4 and MP3 with bitrate control, batch downloads, and in-browser preview — built with copyright compliance in mind.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of features, supported formats, and the copyright-first approach.
- [Convert & Download](/tool): Paste a URL, detect available streams, and download or convert media.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): The three-step process from URL to file, plus what happens behind the scenes.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about supported sites, quality, conversion, privacy, and copyright.
- [Help & Support](/help): Chat with the AI assistant for troubleshooting and questions.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): What data is collected, how it's used, and retention practices.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Acceptable use, copyright compliance, and rate limits.
